channel.title: Rover on RoBug Build Log
channel.description: Recent content in Rover on RoBug Build Log

item.title: Rethinking the Architecture
item.description: The skid-steered mars rover concept turns out to have two fatal flaws — structural rigidity and steering. Here’s how I worked through both.

item.title: Drivetrain Concept
item.description: Working out the power requirements, then evaluating every drivetrain and suspension concept — from tracks to Mars rovers — before landing on a 6WD rocker-bogie derivative.
